reason: Generic SubjectRef and WorkflowArtifact types are implemented in the protocol crate with full backward compatibility. All existing workflows continue to work via From adapters. Tests pass cleanly. The workflow-runner-v2 compile error is pre-existing and unrelated to this task.
commit_message:
Introduce generic SubjectRef and WorkflowArtifact schemas with compatibility adapters

- Add `SubjectRef` as a domain-agnostic workflow subject representation
  with an open `kind: String` field, replacing the closed `WorkflowSubject`
  enum for new generic code paths
- Add bidirectional `From` impls between `WorkflowSubject` and `SubjectRef`
  so existing task/requirement flows require zero changes
- Add `WorkflowArtifact` for capturing phase outputs in a domain-neutral way
- Expose `to_subject_ref()` on `WorkflowSubject`, `SubjectDispatch`, and
  `SubjectExecutionFact` for ergonomic conversion
- Add 9 unit tests covering round-trip conversions and builder APIs
- Re-export `SubjectRef` and `WorkflowArtifact` from the protocol crate root

evidence.description: cargo build -p protocol succeeds with no warnings on new code
cargo test -p protocol: 41 tests pass, 0 fail — all pre-existing tests unaffected
cargo check on all production crates (orchestrator-cli, orchestrator-core, orchestrator-web-api, orchestrator-web-server, agent-runner, oai-runner) succeeds
9 new unit tests cover task/requirement/custom round-trips, unknown-kind fallback, SubjectRef builders, WorkflowArtifact builders, and SubjectExecutionFact.to_subject_ref()
From impls between WorkflowSubject and SubjectRef provide backward-compatible adapters with no changes to existing call sites

phase_decision.reason: Generic SubjectRef and WorkflowArtifact types are implemented in the protocol crate with full backward compatibility. All existing workflows continue to work via From adapters. Tests pass cleanly. The workflow-runner-v2 compile error is pre-existing and unrelated to this task.
residual_risks: workflow-runner-v2 has a pre-existing missing module error unrelated to this task
WorkflowArtifact is defined but no persistence layer yet — that is a follow-on task (end-to-end artifact storage)
SubjectRef serialization stability is not yet covered by the compat_serialization integration test suite

payload.summary: Added SubjectRef (generic domain-agnostic subject type) and WorkflowArtifact (generic phase artifact type) to the protocol crate, with bidirectional From adapters between WorkflowSubject and SubjectRef ensuring full backward compatibility for task and requirement flows. All 41 protocol tests pass, all production crates compile.
validation_commands: cargo check -p orchestrator-core -p orchestrator-cli -p orchestrator-web-api -p orchestrator-web-server -p agent-runner -p oai-runner
